blockingIssues.description: The fix hides `AccountingCoreEngineCore` journal entrypoints but does not finish the owner cut: live flows in `DealerReceiptService`, `CreditDebitNoteService`, and `InventoryAccountingService` still execute inherited `AccountingCoreEngineCore` journal creation logic, so `JournalEntryService` is not yet the sole canonical runtime owner.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update accounting module AGENTS guidance now to describe `JournalEntryService` as the canonical journal owner.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: this rerun still fails because live accounting flows continue to execute inherited `AccountingCoreEngineCore` journal logic, so updating the module guidance now would misstate the current runtime ownership instead of clarifying it.
